name: xxd
description: Make a hexdump or do the reverse

name: -autoskip
-a
options.description: Toggle autoskip: A single '*' replaces nul-lines.  Default off

name: -bits
-b
options.description: Switch to bits (binary digits) dump, rather than hexdump

name: -capitalize
-C
options.description: Capitalize variable names in C include file style, when using -i

name: -EBCDIC
-E
options.description: Change the character encoding in the righthand column from ASCII to EBCDIC

name: -groupsize
-g
options.description: Separate the output of every <bytes> bytes

name: -include
-i
options.description: Output in C include file style

name: -name
-n
options.description: Override the variable name output when -i is used

options.name: -o
options.description: Add <offset> to the displayed file position

name: -postscript
-plain
-ps
-p
options.description: Output in postscript continuous hexdump style

name: -revert
-r
options.description: Reverse operation: convert (or patch) hexdump into binary

options.name: -seek
options.description: When used after -r: revert with <offset> added to file positions found in hexdump

options.name: -u
options.description: Use upper case hex letters. Default is lower case
